sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85023" key="polulimeno/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυ-λῐμενότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85023.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">richness in harbours,</tr_> Men.Rh.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:p.352S" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.352S.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
